_note: Limited-use features from the authored content layer: the subclasses in src/lib/srd/subclasses.json and the lineages added to src/lib/srd/races.json, as spendable counters. Same row shape as src/lib/classes/resources.json plus `proficiency` (uses = that multiple of the proficiency bonus), `scale` (a descending [level, uses] table) and `byLevel` (a pool sized by character level). Original wording, like the tables themselves. A feature listed here is enforced: use_resource spends it and rests refill it.

resources.guidance: Spent on a maneuver attached to an attack: Trip, Disarm, Riposte, Precision, Menacing, Commander's Strike and the rest. The die is added to the damage or to the roll the maneuver names, and its save DC is 8 + proficiency + Strength or Dexterity.

The shared pool behind every psionic feature of this subclass. One die returns on a short rest; the rest on a long rest. The die size grows with level: d6, then d8 at 5th, d10 at 11th and d12 at 17th.
A bonus action granting advantage on weapon attacks this turn plus temporary hit points: 5 at 3rd level, 10 at 10th, 15 at 15th.
A bonus action for 1 minute: become Large, advantage on Strength checks and saves, and one extra damage die per turn.
A reaction forcing an attacker to reroll a hit against an ally within 60 feet.
One extra melee attack made from the echo's space when taking the Attack action. Resolve it with pc_attack like any other.
When the echo is destroyed by damage, gain 2d6 + Constitution modifier temporary hit points.
A reaction making the echo the target of an attack aimed at another creature.
A reaction adding 1d8 to an ally's AC against one attack, halving the damage if it still hits.
A reaction on taking damage that grants a full extra turn before the damage lands.

An arrow's magical rider, chosen from the options known and applied on a hit: Banishing, Beguiling, Bursting, Enfeebling, Grasping, Piercing, Seeking or Shadow. Its save DC is 8 + proficiency + Intelligence.
A reaction imposing disadvantage on one attack roll, against the cleric and, from 6th level, an ally within 30 feet.
A reaction dealing 2d8 lightning or thunder damage to a creature that hit the cleric in melee, halved on a Dexterity save.
A bonus-action weapon attack after taking the Attack action. Resolve it with pc_attack.
An action sensing undead within 60 feet, through walls but not a foot of stone or thin metal.
A reaction turning a critical hit against a creature within 30 feet into an ordinary hit.
Share the cleric's 300-foot darkvision with willing creatures within 10 feet for an hour.
A bonus action in dim light or darkness granting a flying speed equal to the walking speed for 1 minute.
A pool of d6s equal to the druid's level. Spend any number as a bonus action to heal a creature within 120 feet that many d6, plus 1 temporary hit point per die.
A bonus action teleporting the druid 60 feet, or a willing creature they touch 30 feet.
A bonus action raising a 30-foot Bear, Hawk or Unicorn spirit aura for 1 minute.
Triggers on its own when the druid drops to 0 hit points: four dire wolves appear and defend them for an hour.
A reaction reanimating a beast or humanoid that just died within 10 feet as a zombie under the druid's command for an hour.
Free castings of guiding bolt from the map, without a spell slot. Resolve the attack with cast_at_enemy.
A reaction adding a d6 (Weal) or subtracting one (Woe) on an attack, check or save by a creature within 30 feet. The omen is chosen after each long rest and does not change until the next one.
Triggers when the druid drops to 0 hit points while the wildfire spirit is out: the spirit is destroyed and the druid returns at half their hit point maximum.
A free casting of dream, scrying or teleportation circle after a short rest, without a slot.
After a minute of performance, up to a proficiency-bonus number of humanoids within 60 feet are charmed for an hour on a failed Wisdom save.
A bonus action granting a minute of free command castings, with listeners unable to attack the bard while charmed.
A bonus action for 1 minute: an attacker must pass a Charisma save or lose the attack and be unable to target the bard that turn.
A minute of private conversation frightens a humanoid for an hour on a failed Wisdom save.
A reaction capturing the shadow of a humanoid that died within 30 feet, wearable as their identity for an hour.
A whispered secret charms a creature within 30 feet for 8 hours on a failed Wisdom save, and it obeys reasonable requests.
A reaction copying a successful Bardic Inspiration die onto another creature within 60 feet, without spending an inspiration use.
An action creating a nonmagical item worth up to 20 times the bard's level. A spell slot buys extra uses.
An action animating a Large or smaller object as a dancing item that acts on the bard's turn. A spell slot buys extra uses.
An hour-long seance granting one divination or necromancy spell, castable until the next long rest.
A bonus action granting up to ten allies within 60 feet advantage on attacks and saves until the barbarian's next turn.
A free casting of augury or clairvoyance using Wisdom, with no slot or components.
An action sensing spells and magic items within 60 feet, through most barriers.
Touch an ally to grant a bonus d3 on attacks and ability checks for 10 minutes, or restore one expended spell slot of 3rd level or lower.
A natural-weapon hit forces a Wisdom save: the target either attacks a creature of the barbarian's choice or takes 2d12 psychic damage.
A bonus action when raging: up to five allies each add a weapon damage die to one hit per turn, and the barbarian gains 5 temporary hit points per ally who accepts.
A bonus action cursing a creature for 1 minute: bonus damage equal to the warlock's proficiency bonus, critical hits on a 19 or 20 against it, and hit points back when it dies.
An action charming or frightening every creature in a 10-foot cube that fails a Wisdom save, until the end of the warlock's next turn.
A reaction on taking damage that turns the warlock invisible and teleports them 60 feet.
A reaction imposing disadvantage on an attack; if it then misses, the warlock has advantage on their next attack against that creature.
A pool of d6s equal to 1 + the warlock's level. Spend up to their Charisma modifier of them as a bonus action to heal a creature within 60 feet.
Instead of rolling a death save, rise at half hit points, blinding enemies within 30 feet and dealing 2d8 + Charisma radiant damage to them.
A humanoid the warlock kills rises as an obedient specter with extra temporary hit points until the next long rest.
A bonus action summoning a spectral tentacle for 1 minute: a 10-foot reach attack for 1d8 cold damage that also halves the target's speed.
Teleport the warlock and up to five willing creatures to a body of water within a mile.
A bonus action for 1 minute: 1d10 + warlock level temporary hit points, immunity to being frightened, and one creature hit each turn is frightened on a failed Wisdom save.
Instead of dropping to 0 hit points, stay at 1 and deal necrotic damage equal to the warlock's level to each creature within 30 feet.
An hour of spirit form: resistance to most damage, movement through solid matter, and necrotic and psychic spell damage that heals the warlock.
Regain 1d8 + Constitution modifier hit points on succeeding at a death save or stabilizing a creature.
A bonus action healing 1d8 + warlock level and reattaching severed body parts.
Retreat inside the vessel for up to 10 minutes; from 10th level up to five companions come too and gain temporary hit points on a short rest inside.
Replicate any spell of 6th level or lower without components. In the fiction this needs several days to recharge, so grant it sparingly.
Advantage on one attack, ability check or saving throw. The DM may trigger a Wild Magic Surge afterwards to restore the use.
Add 2d4 to a failed saving throw or a missed attack, possibly turning it into a success.
A bonus action at half hit points or less, restoring hit points equal to half the sorcerer's maximum.
A Charisma save against 5 + the damage leaves the sorcerer at 1 hit point instead of 0.
A reaction cancelling advantage or disadvantage on a roll by a creature within 60 feet.
A minute during which attacks against the sorcerer cannot have advantage and any d20 of 9 or lower counts as a 10 on their attacks, checks and saves.
A 30-foot cube healing 100 hit points among creatures in it, ending spells of 6th level or lower and repairing objects.
Teleport 120 feet, pulling creatures toward the vacated space for 3d10 force damage on a failed Strength save.
A 30-foot burst matching the current moon phase: healing, blinding radiance or a burst of speed.
Rolled after each long rest and kept as fixed numbers. Spend one to replace the result of an attack, check or save by the wizard or a creature they can see, declared before the roll.
A reaction interposing an illusory duplicate so an attack that would hit misses instead.
A reaction redirecting an attack aimed at the wizard onto another creature within the attacker's reach, on a failed Wisdom save.
An action charming and incapacitating a creature within 5 feet until the end of the wizard's next turn, extendable each turn as an action.
Teleport 30 feet or swap places with a willing creature. Also recharges whenever the wizard casts a conjuration spell of 1st level or higher.
A free self-polymorph into a beast of challenge rating 1 or lower, without a spell slot.

A bonus action for 1 minute: add the Intelligence modifier to AC, 10 feet of speed, advantage on Acrobatics, and a bonus on concentration saves. It ends if the wizard wears medium or heavy armor or a shield, or is incapacitated.
A reaction forcing a creature within 30 feet to reroll an attack, check or save, before or after the result is known.
A Large or smaller creature within 60 feet is incapacitated and frozen in time until the end of the wizard's next turn on a failed Constitution save.
Store a spell of 4th level or lower in a bead that any creature can break to cast it, using the wizard's spellcasting numbers.
A reaction adding 1d10 to a weapon damage roll or 2d10 per 10 feet to falling damage within 60 feet.
A minute of crushing gravity in a 30-foot radius: 2d10 force damage and no movement on a failed Strength save. A 4th-level slot buys extra uses.
A bonus action projecting the spellbook's spirit up to 300 feet, letting the wizard cast from its position. A spell slot buys extra uses.
After a long rest, create a spell scroll of a 1st or 2nd-level spell from the book, cast at maximum effect.
Avoid death by destroying the book's magic, which then takes days of study to rebuild.
An action revealing a creature's damage immunities, resistances and vulnerabilities, or that it has none.
A reaction forcing a caster or teleporter within 60 feet to make a Wisdom save or lose the spell and the action.
A bonus-action etherealness lasting a single turn.
Sense the distance and direction to the closest planar portal within a mile.
A bonus action granting a 10-foot flying speed for 1 minute, carried by the swarm.
A reaction granting resistance to the damage just taken and teleporting the ranger 30 feet.
A free misty step that can bring one willing creature within 5 feet along.
A free casting of summon fey without a spell slot; the summoned fey can turn invisible.
Summon the bonded drake for an hour. It acts on the ranger's turn, adds their proficiency bonus to its rolls, and can be resummoned with a spell slot.
The drake exhales a 30-foot cone for 8d6 of its damage type, halved on a Dexterity save. A 3rd-level slot buys extra uses.
After a sneak attack, a second creature within 30 feet takes half the sneak attack dice in necrotic damage.
A bonus action granting 10 minutes of spectral form: a 10-foot fly speed and movement through creatures and objects. A soul trinket buys extra uses.
An hour of invisibility, ending early if the rogue deals damage or forces a saving throw. A Psionic Energy die buys extra uses.
A sneak attack with Psychic Blades stuns a creature for 1 minute on a failed Wisdom save. Three Psionic Energy dice buy extra uses.
A reaction stealing a spell cast at the rogue on a failed save by the caster, denying it to them for 8 hours and letting the rogue cast it once.
An action sensing illusions, shapechangers and other magical deception within 30 feet, without learning what is hidden.
Reroll a missed attack, with advantage.
Spend 5 ki to return a creature dead no more than 24 hours to life with 4d10 + Wisdom hit points, free of every condition it died with.
Replace one Attack-action attack with a 20-foot cone or 30-foot line dealing the martial arts die in the monk's chosen damage type, halved on a Dexterity save. Ki buys extra uses.
While airborne, gain a flying speed equal to the walking speed for that turn.
A bonus action raising a 10-foot aura for 1 minute that either frightens enemies or grants allies resistance to the monk's damage type. Three ki buys extra uses.
A reaction adding the paladin's Charisma modifier to the AC of themselves or an ally within 10 feet; if the attack then misses, they may attack the attacker.
Triggers on its own: drop to 1 hit point instead of 0.
A reaction reducing incoming damage by 1d12 + the goliath's Constitution modifier.
Touch a creature to restore hit points equal to the aasimar's level.
A minute of transformation from 3rd level: spectral wings granting flight, and extra radiant damage once per turn.
A bonus action turning the firbolg invisible until the start of their next turn, or until they attack, cast or force a save.
A free casting of detect magic or disguise self, using Wisdom, without a slot. Disguise self can change the firbolg's size between Medium and Small.
Extra damage equal to the goblin's level on a hit against a creature larger than them.
A bonus-action bite that, on a hit, also grants temporary hit points equal to the lizardfolk's Constitution modifier.

The genasi's inherited spell, cast without a slot: burning hands, create or destroy water, levitate or pass without trace depending on their element. The matching cantrip is at will and does not use this counter.
A reaction adding the artificer's Intelligence modifier to an ability check or saving throw by them or an ally within 30 feet.

resources.displayName: The Right Tool for the Job
match: the right tool for the job
resources.guidance: An hour with tinker's tools conjures any set of artisan's tools needed, lasting until the next use.
Elixirs brewed on a long rest, each with a random effect: healing, swiftness, resilience, boldness, flight or transformation. Extra elixirs can be brewed by spending a spell slot.
A bonus action builds a flamethrower, force ballista or protector cannon that acts on the artificer's command. A spell slot buys extra uses.
After a long rest, store a 1st or 2nd-level artificer spell in an item; the holder can cast it twice the artificer's Intelligence modifier in times.
Once per turn, a magic-weapon or Steel Defender hit deals an extra 2d6 force damage, or heals a creature within 30 feet 2d6. Rises to 4d6 at 15th level.
Free castings of lesser restoration without a spell slot.

A bonus action spends one Wild Shape use to take a starry form for 10 minutes: Archer (a bonus-action luminous arrow, resolved by the server), Chalice (healing spells also heal a second creature 1d8 + WIS), or Dragon (concentration saves treat a low d20 as a 10). Pass variant to choose; the constellation's mechanics apply automatically. This counter mirrors Wild Shape uses.
